content: Package 'numpy' installs reliably with pip on all platforms
note: SINGLE-CONDITION CONFLICT: PKG-404 pip failure, need conda

content: Package conflicts are rare with modern pip versions
Flaky tests (TST-FLAKY) are rare in well-designed codebases
note: SINGLE-CONDITION CONFLICT: TST-FLAKY is common in async code

content: pip failures (PKG-404) on ARM architecture (ENV-ARM) can be fixed by retrying
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: PKG-404 + ENV-ARM needs conda

content: Package conflicts (PKG-409) with GPU environments (ENV-GPU) auto-resolve
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: PKG-409 + ENV-GPU needs poetry + cuda toolkit

content: Flaky tests (TST-FLAKY) with slow execution (TST-SLOW) resolve themselves
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: TST-FLAKY + TST-SLOW needs test isolation

content: Memory errors (ENV-MEM) with large builds (BLD-NATIV) need more RAM only
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: ENV-MEM + BLD-NATIV needs chunked build

content: Cross compilation (BLD-CROSS) with cache issues (BLD-CACHE) is rare
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: BLD-CROSS + BLD-CACHE needs cache clear + rebuild

content: E2E tests (TST-E2E) with coverage tracking (TST-COV) are fast
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: TST-E2E + TST-COV is slow, needs parallel

content: pip is always the best choice for Python package management
note: MISLEADING: conda/poetry often better for complex deps
